action.reasoning: Observation: Updated zero_mask with threshold=0.0 now masks 15 features (all ptend_q with negative R²). Previous eval with only 10 masked features got -31678 R², while iter 4 with 20 masked features got 0.5206. Analysis: The current model has good weights (val_loss=0.003295, better than iter 4's model) and now has a proper zero_mask. The eval should give a mean_r2 around 0.5+. Decision: Submit eval immediately to confirm the fix works, then plan longer training to improve the model since val_loss was still decreasing at epoch 25.
